hero.tagline: Connecting global markets with superior quality food
hero.subtitle: Import, export and distribution of premium coffee and food products

about.title: Who We Are
about.p1: At Global Distribuidora y Comercializadora, C.A., we are more than importers and exporters; we are essential facilitators who bring the flavors of the world to your table and unlock your product's potential in international markets.
about.p2: We were founded with a clear vision: to overcome the logistical barriers that once limited access to high-quality food products.
about.p3: Today, we operate as a comprehensive strategic partner, managing the complexities of cross-border trade from start to finish, with specialization in two critical areas.

coffee.title: Commitment to Origin: Our Coffee
coffee.description: Our journey began with a passion for coffee. We are dedicated to the import and export of exceptional coffee beans, carefully selecting premium and specialty lots and ensuring full traceability from farm to roaster.
points: Quality and aroma preservation throughout the logistics chain

food.title: Global Efficiency: Food and Distribution
food.description: We complement our coffee expertise with a strong capability in the distribution and commercialization of all types of food products.
points: Speed, safety, and full regulatory compliance

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: To connect global markets with superior-quality food products by importing and exporting exceptional coffee and providing robust logistics solutions for the efficient distribution and commercialization of all types of food products. We are committed to operating with unwavering efficiency, strict regulatory compliance, and complete customer satisfaction throughout the entire supply chain.

vision.title: Vision
vision.text: To become a leading global benchmark in the food supply chain, recognized for our excellence in the import and export of gourmet coffee and for our agile and innovative distribution capabilities across all categories of food products, setting the standards for trust, efficiency, and sustainability in international trade.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We are ready to be your strategic partner in international food trade

footer.description: Import, export and distribution of premium coffee and superior quality food products.
